# Knowledge Base — `docs/knowledge/`

Domain-specific technical notes for the SAM-Body4D golf-grip project. One markdown file per domain,
cross-linked, with diagrams under `assets/<topic>/`. Source of truth is here in git; large media is
mirrored to GCS (see [Dev environment & data flow](dev_environment_and_data.md)).

## Conventions
- **Template:** [`_TEMPLATE.md`](_TEMPLATE.md) — copy for new docs.
- **Verification legend:** `[V]` verbatim/observed · `[D]` documented (cited) · `[I]` inference · `[M]` verify on-machine.
- **Links:** standard markdown relative links (`[text](other.md)`) so GitHub, MkDocs, Obsidian, and Foam all resolve them. A labeled `[[wikilink]]` demo line appears in each doc to show native wiki-nav in Obsidian/Foam.
- **Source citations:** show the **full URL as the link text**, not a shortened domain — e.g. `[https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/.../index.html](https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/.../index.html)`, with a `retrieved YYYY-MM-DD` date.
- **Diagrams:** Graphviz `.dot` source rendered to **`.svg`** via `python scripts/kb.py render`, both under `assets/<topic>/`. Embed the `.svg`, then follow it with a **source/render block** linking the `.dot` and `.svg`:
  ```
  **Diagram**
  - **source:** [name.dot](assets/<topic>/name.dot)
  - **render:** [name.svg](assets/<topic>/name.svg)
  ```
- **Assets:** local-first; large/photographic media git-ignored and mirrored to GCS.

## Reading-layer bake-off (temporary)
This folder is currently set up to be browsed four ways for evaluation — GitHub web, Obsidian, Foam (VS Code),
and a local MkDocs Material site. See [`READING_LAYER_EVALUATION.md`](READING_LAYER_EVALUATION.md) for the walkthrough.
